economic_notes: GBEs include Nuxalk Business Trust (100%), Nuxalk Development LP (99.9%), and Bella Coola Hotel/0820770 B.C. Ltd. (100%). BC Gaming account held separately. Internally restricted surplus of $1,500,000 for Longhouse.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) Social housing TCA amortized per CMHC requirements rather than PSAS useful life method; (2) GBE financial information not available for year-end, scope limitation on equity method investments. Consolidated subsidiaries: Nuxalk Acwsalcmalslayc Academy of Learning Society, Nuxalk Nation Property Management, Nuxalk Nation Transition House Society. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Accumulated surplus note shows $41,612,842 plus internally restricted $1,500,000 Longhouse = $43,112,842 total. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNHA, Province of BC, Fisheries and Oceans, Coast Opportunity Funds, FNESS, CMHC, and other government funding; rental, interest, and administration revenue treated as OSR. Obligations under capital lease of $158,028 not included in long_term_debt figure.
